source_description: Outside, the sun shines on a multi-story brick apartment building with trees in the foreground. Instrumental music plays. Inside a purple-walled apartment, Chandler enters through the front door, wearing a green short-sleeved shirt and tan pants.

Phoebe continues, "This is unbelievable," while gesturing toward Joey. Joey, in a red and white long-sleeved shirt, leans back on a beige sofa with his head resting on the back and his eyes closed.

Joey’s eyes snap open and he jerks his head forward, gasping audibly and waving his hands in the air. Audience laughter is heard.
Joey turns his head toward Chandler and says, "Dude, is he trying to kill me?" with his voice rising on "kill me." Chandler stands with his hands out to his sides.

Rachel enters the apartment through the front door, wearing a white floral top and blue jeans.
